knowledge.title: Inferno A site: pit + balcony crossfire
knowledge.description: CT A: one player pit (close angle on apartments exit), one player site/balcony (long angle from CT spawn). Pit traps apps push, balcony trades. Avoid both on site — apps push frags both with one molly.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: pit-balcony is standard CT A setup on Inferno

knowledge.title: Inferno B site: car + new box anchor
knowledge.description: CT B: one player car (close angle on banana), one player new box (back of site). Car traps banana push, new box trades. The off-angle behind banana smoke is also viable but riskier.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: car-newbox crossfire is the dominant Inferno B setup

knowledge.title: Inferno banana: top banana CT with utility
knowledge.description: CT banana player holds top banana with molly + flash. The molly delays T banana push by ~3 seconds; the flash supports a peek for the first frag. Losing top banana control loses ~30% of B round win expectation.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: top banana control predicts B round outcome on Inferno

knowledge.title: Inferno A execute: smoke CT + smoke library + molly pit
knowledge.description: A execute: smoke CT (cuts rotate from CT spawn), smoke library (cuts the long angle), molly pit (clears the close hold), flash from short for entry. ~72% plant rate on Inferno A with full utility.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full-utility A execute is the canonical Inferno T A strat

knowledge.title: Inferno B execute: smoke CT + smoke coffin + molly newbox
knowledge.description: B execute from banana: smoke CT (cuts the rotate), smoke coffin (cuts the off-angle), molly newbox (clears the anchor), flash from banana entry. Plant for banana angle. ~70% plant rate with full B execute.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: full-utility B execute is most reliable Inferno B strat

knowledge.title: Inferno banana molly: deny top banana control
knowledge.description: Throw a molly to top banana before any T banana push. The molly delays the CT hold by ~3 seconds and burns CT utility (they often respond with a flash or smoke). Cheap, high-value setup utility.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: top banana molly is in ~80% of T banana pushes on Inferno

knowledge.title: Inferno pistol: CT A stack
knowledge.description: Inferno T pistol typically goes B (banana is the easier pistol push) so CTs should stack 3 B with banana molly + close-angle holds. 2 A passive. T A pistol pushes are rare and CT can rotate.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: T pistol B push rate on Inferno is ~70%

knowledge.title: Inferno force buy: B through banana with molly
knowledge.description: Inferno B force buys (Galil + flash + molly) work because banana is utility-driven, not aim-driven. A forces on Inferno have low success — apartments has too many angles to clear under-buy.
knowledge.situation: T force buy decision on Inferno
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: Inferno B force wins ~40%, A force ~22%

knowledge.title: Inferno save: exit through CT spawn rotates
knowledge.description: Lost-round saves on Inferno: route back through CT spawn or T ramp. Avoid banana saves — CT pushes on lost rounds catch banana savers from above. ~70% rifle retention rate possible with disciplined saves.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Inferno save retention rate ~70%

knowledge.title: Inferno apartments duel: pre-aim head level on balcony exit
knowledge.description: Apartments-to-A push: pre-aim head level on the balcony exit angle. The CT will be holding from balcony or pit — both are head-level pre-aims at common spots. Mis-aimed crosshair = automatic loss.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: top players hold apps angles with head-level pre-aim >90%

knowledge.title: Inferno banana duel: shoulder peek bait the AWP
knowledge.description: Before banana push, shoulder peek to bait the CT AWP. If you draw the shot, push immediately — the AWPer is in scope-out for ~0.4s. Banana AWP duels are decided by who initiates with bait.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: shoulder peek + commit on no-shot wins ~55% of banana AWP duels

knowledge.title: Inferno close site: spray through smoke is standard
knowledge.description: Inferno sites have so many smokes thrown that wallbang spray accounts for ~15% of site frags. Spray through smokes at chest level on a re-entry — if the CT is repositioning, you'll catch them in the smoke transit.
knowledge.situation: Site retake or entry through smokes
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: smoke wallbang accounts for ~15% of Inferno site frags

knowledge.title: Inferno apps contact: commit to A or fall back to mid
knowledge.description: If you take a trade in apps, commit to A within 5 seconds — the CT has rotated. Slow play after apps contact gives time for CT re-rotates. Commit or fall back, never sit.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: post-apps-contact A commit wins ~58% on Inferno

knowledge.title: Inferno IGL: banana info is the highest-value read
knowledge.description: On every default round, send a banana player for early info. Banana sound cues confirm CT B count and trigger the A vs B commit. Banana info is the highest-value information point on Inferno.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: tier-1 Inferno IGLs base ~60% of commit calls on banana info

knowledge.title: Inferno B fake: 25-second commit
knowledge.description: Inferno B fakes commit utility for 25 seconds (smokes + molly + gunfire) then re-rotate to A through apps. CT will burn rotates. A becomes 4v3 with full utility. 25 seconds is the sweet spot — shorter fakes don't pull rotates.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: 25-second B fake to A execute wins ~58% on Inferno

knowledge.title: Inferno A retake: from arch + library with smoke + flash
knowledge.description: A retake from arch and library with smoke (cuts the lurk) + flash + 3-stack. Avoid pit retakes — pit is the worst angle to push from on Inferno. Arch retakes win ~50% with full utility.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: arch retakes win ~50% on Inferno A

knowledge.title: Inferno B post-plant: hold from coffin or banana lurk
knowledge.description: Post-plant B: lurk back to coffin OR back to banana corner. Coffin holds the CT close angle; banana lurk holds the rotate from A. Choose based on which retake direction the CT is most likely to take.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: coffin and banana lurks both outperform site-hold by ~10 points

knowledge.title: Inferno A plant: in front of pit, exposed to balcony
knowledge.description: Default A plant is in front of pit, exposed to balcony. The lurker can pre-fire balcony defuse. Avoid plants behind site — the CT defuses from cover.
knowledge.pro_example: Pro meta: front-of-pit plant has highest post-plant WR on Inferno A
